Content:
Hoppers (2026) is an action animated comedy sci-fi film rated PG, with a runtime of 105 minutes. It is scheduled for release on March 6, 2026. The film is directed by Daniel Chong and written by Jesse Andrews and Daniel Chong. The cast includes Jon Hamm, Bobby Moynihan, and Piper Curda. It is produced by Walt Disney Pictures.

In “Hoppers,” scientists have discovered how to “hop” human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Using this new technology, Mabel (Curda) will uncover mysteries within the animal world that are beyond anything she could have imagined.

Title: The Bride

Summary: "The Bride" (2026) is an R-rated horror drama directed by Maggie Gyllenhaal, set for release on March 6, 2026. Content:
The Bride (2026) is a horror drama romance film rated R, with a runtime of 126 minutes. It is set to be released on March 6, 2026, and is directed and written by Maggie Gyllenhaal. The cast includes Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale, Peter Sarsgaard, Annette Bening, Jake Gyllenhaal, and Penélope Cruz. The film is produced by Warner Brothers.

The story follows a lonely Frankenstein (Bale) who travels to 1930s Chicago to meet groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious (Annette Bening) to create a companion for him. They revive a murdered young woman, and The Bride (Buckley) is born. The film is a bold, iconoclastic take on one of the world's most compelling stories, blending life, macabre romance, and ambitious ideas into a visually striking and emotionally intense narrative.
